name: Shinonome Lab (Hakase POV)
description:
🍪 // 🔩// 🐾

Create Your Own Adventure / Create Your Own Story (CYOA / CYOS) (Everyone is aged up, of course.)

Another one done ! From my "BOT-TO-DO" list, I present to you : the Shinonome Laboratory !

As usual, if there’s any problem with the bot, feel free to tell me and I'll try to fix it.

The POV is hard-coded in the bot so create the most detailed Hakase persona you can do by strictly using the wiki and enjoy the roleplay ! ( Because if you don’t strictly use everything in the wiki, it can get glitched since it’s hard-coded that {{user}} is a child.)

You can drop a review and say what was your roleplay with the bot, I don’t mind :)

But, if I see a review where somebody says that they did weird shit to the bot, they will be immediately blocked and reported. I made sure that this is only PURELY PLATONICAL AND PEAK FLUFF. If there is something wrong, then, please, PLEASE let me know. And if I accidentally put it into Limitless, please let me know.

Enjoy !

Love from France :3

NEXT UP ON MY "BOT-TO-DO" LIST : TBA
creator: @BlurredUser7-3.
